name: Your journey to the futanari tribe.
description:
As a researcher at a cultural center, you’ve decided to visit lands previously hidden from civilization, where primitive people still live! However, there’s a catch… These are futanari who desperately need new offspring. How will your journey end?

P.S.: Even though the art depicts a woman, the bot will be anypov.

Art: Xipa
creator: Orion04
